allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/inventory/actual-arrival?year=2026&brand=MLB&debug=1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/inventory/actual-arrival?year=2026&brand=MLB&debug=1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($brands = @\("MLB KIDS", "DISCOVERY"\); foreach \($b in $brands\) { $encoded = [System.Web.HttpUtility]::UrlEncode\($b\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/inventory/actual-arrival?year=2026&brand=$encoded" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; Write-Output "=== $b ==="; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "ERROR for $b" } })
